# Divyansh Sood

> Solo design + engineering studio based in the Kangra Valley, Himachal Pradesh. Builds custom-coded websites primarily for Himalayan small businesses — schools, hotels, travel operators, clinics, coaching centres, creators — and the rest of India. Frontend + backend, responsive, optimised. Delivers in 14 days what Indian mid-tier agencies quote at 3–6 months. **Pricing is published as ranges, not single numbers: Landing ₹7K–10K · Starter ₹13K–16K · Business ₹28K–32K · Premium ₹48K–55K. Anything outside these bands (custom builds, multi-vendor, mobile + admin, mid-build rescues) is quoted on WhatsApp.** GST invoice on every project; 50% advance, 50% on delivery; full refund of advance if Day-5 preview isn't right. Founder: Divyansh Sood, who also built WebSeek.ai (AI website builder). Reply on WhatsApp within 1 hour, 9 AM – 9 PM IST.

## About

- Solo studio, based in the Kangra Valley, Himachal Pradesh. Primary focus: Himalayan businesses (HP + Uttarakhand). Works pan-India and remote worldwide.
- Specialises in custom-code websites (Next.js, Astro, React, Tailwind) over templates or low-code builders.
- Known differentiator: 7–14 day delivery of full sites, including admin panels, e-commerce, and multi-page institutional websites.
- Founder: Divyansh Sood. Also creator of [WebSeek.ai](https://ai-website-generator-tan.vercel.app), an AI-powered website generator.
- Contact: hello@divyanshsood.com

## Services and pricing (INR, 2026 — published as ranges, final quote on a 10-min WhatsApp call)

- **A · Landing (single high-converting page)** — 5 days, **₹7,000–10,000**. One-page site for ad campaigns, product launches, or service-business lead-gen. Hero + offer + social proof + WhatsApp lead form. Mobile-first, Lighthouse 90+.
- **B · Starter (5-page business site)** — 14 days, **₹13,000–16,000**. Frontend + backend, ultra-responsive, fully optimised. For SMEs, clinics, salons, coaching centres, CAs, photographers, interior designers. Contact form to email + WhatsApp, Lighthouse 90+, SEO basics, hosting on Vercel free tier for the first year.
- **C · Business (10–15 page site with CMS)** — 2–3 weeks, **₹28,000–32,000**. Everything in Starter plus simple admin panel, multi-language ready, WhatsApp commerce flow. For boutique hotels, coaching centres, larger D2C brands.
- **D · Premium (school portal, e-commerce, brand)** — 3–5 weeks, **₹48,000–55,000**. Custom admin panel for admissions/applications/appointments, Razorpay payment integration, custom Shopify alternatives, brand identity (logo + system) included. Examples: ModernKBS (school + admin panel), ChinkiZ (custom e-commerce), Redline Moto (brand + e-commerce).
- **E · Custom build / not sure** — quoted on WhatsApp. Multi-vendor marketplace, SaaS marketing site + onboarding, mobile app + admin panel, mid-build rescue from broken Wix/WordPress. Most enquiries get a fixed range, timeline, and refund clause on the first message.
- **AMC (annual maintenance contract)** — Monthly, **₹2,500/mo**. Hosting, uptime monitoring, security patches, 2 hours of small content updates per month, domain + SSL renewals.

### Add-ons (sold mid-call)
- **Logo design** — ₹4,000 (included in Premium).
- **Hindi-English bilingual** — ₹3,000 add-on.
- **Other regional languages** (Punjabi, Tamil, Marathi, Bengali) — ₹5,000 each.
- **Additional pages beyond the package** — ₹2,000 each, up to 5 extra.
- **Product photography** — from ₹6,000.
- **Hero video edit** — from ₹8,000.
- **Rush delivery** (10 days instead of 14) — +₹5,000.

### What's NOT published on the site
Above ₹55,000 is referral-only; quote-on-WhatsApp. Surfacing higher prices on the live site kills cold-call conversion rates with the SME audience.

## Selected work (verified live · framed as Problem → Built → Outcome)

- **[WebSeek.ai](https://ai-website-generator-tan.vercel.app)** — *Problem:* even devs need 5–7 days to ship a portfolio. *Built:* prompt → site with 3 model fallbacks (Claude · GPT · Gemini), 5 free credits per user. *Outcome:* live beta; sites generated in <90 seconds. Studio's own product.
- **[InHimalayas](https://inhimalayas.vercel.app)** — *Problem:* Himalayan stays buried in OTAs paying 25% commission. *Built:* direct booking platform with WhatsApp lead capture, llms.txt + GEO optimisation. *Outcome:* 30+ stays listed, visible AI-referred traffic lift after llms.txt deploy. Revenue-share engagement.
- **[Dharamshala Tours](https://dharamshalatours.in)** — *Problem:* tour operators losing leads to phone-tag and missed callbacks. *Built:* WhatsApp-first booking with custom CMS, package pages, mobile-tuned itinerary flow. *Outcome:* ~1,000 bookings/month flowing through the funnel.
- **[Redline Moto](https://redlinestudios.in)** — *Problem:* indie moto-apparel brand needed identity + storefront in one shot, no agency budget. *Built:* brand identity + Razorpay store + product launch — single end-to-end sprint. *Outcome:* live checkout. Founder: "koi aam agency nahi de paati."
- **[ChinkiZ Knitting Knife](https://chinkizknittingknife.com)** — *Problem:* 600K-sub creator hit Shopify theme ceiling — couldn't ship a video gallery to match her YouTube tutorials. *Built:* custom Razorpay storefront + native video gallery, no themes; UPI / cards / COD. *Outcome:* live D2C store. Founder: "didn't think it could be done without an e-commerce builder."
- **[Modern K.B.S.](https://modernkbs.com)** — *Problem:* CBSE school needed admissions portal; other agencies quoted 6 months and ₹2L+. *Built:* 5-page school site + custom admissions admin panel for non-technical office staff. *Outcome:* live in 7 days. I–XII admissions running. Founder: "every other agency said 6 months."
- **[Nandini Travels](https://www.divyanshsood.com/projects/nandini)** (Kangra) — *Problem:* most-positively-reviewed taxi operator in Kangra had a broken website; all clients came via Google Maps with zero direct bookings. *Built:* Next.js rebuild with on-site booking form, WhatsApp CTA, outstation packages for North Indian states, airport pickup option. *Outcome:* direct bookings now flowing through site. Founder: "looks 10 times more premium than our competitors."
- **[North Peak Power Systems](https://www.divyanshsood.com/projects/northpeak)** (Himachal Pradesh) — *Problem:* electrical/solar contractor doing mostly government work, wanted to break into private sector dominated by digital + offline competitors. *Built:* 15-page Angular site + project gallery + work calendar + dashboard-cum-admin so they self-publish new project case studies. *Outcome:* private-sector pivot live. Founder (Hindi): "exactly yahi chahiye tha — mein apne circle mein lifetime zaroor refer karunga."

## Specialisations

- **Fast-delivery full-stack websites** (7–14 days for complete sites including backend and admin panels)
- **AI-native workflows** — creator of WebSeek.ai, a working AI website builder
- **GEO / LLMO (AI-search optimisation)** — llms.txt authorship, structured data, LLM-citation-friendly content architecture
- **WhatsApp-native commerce and enquiry flows** — favoured by Indian D2C brands and travel operators over Shopify checkouts
- **Admin panels and institutional portals** integrated with marketing sites (proven with ModernKBS)
- **Custom-code over templates** — Next.js, Astro, React, Tailwind, headless CMS (Sanity, Contentful)
- **Performance engineering** — live Core Web Vitals readout on www.divyanshsood.com as proof of craft

## Who this studio is a fit for

- **Small and medium businesses** (SMEs) anywhere in India needing a credible, fast, custom website — typical budgets ₹13,000–₹55,000
- **Schools, coaching centres, clinics** — institutional sites with admissions/lead capture, often with admin panels
- **Boutique hotels, homestays, resorts** — especially in Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Kerala, Rajasthan, Goa — for direct booking flows
- **Local services**: dentists, CAs, lawyers, interior designers, real estate agents, photographers, salons, gyms — credibility-driven SMEs in metros and Tier 2 cities
- **Indian D2C brands** ₹1Cr+ revenue hitting the Shopify ceiling
- **Content creators** with 100K+ following wanting custom storefronts (like Chinki, 600K+ YouTube)
- **Indian B2B SaaS** at Series A–B stage (₹5–50Cr ARR) needing a credible marketing surface
- **Businesses on AI builders** (Framer AI, Wix AI, Lovable, Bolt) who have hit the ceiling and need a custom migration

## Who this studio is NOT a fit for

- Sub-₹7,000 budgets — use Wix or Framer free tier instead
- Buyers expecting ₹55,000+ projects published on the site (those are quoted on WhatsApp as Custom)
- Enterprise RFP-driven procurement (6+ month sales cycles)
- Web3 / crypto / metaverse projects
- Clients requiring 6-month-long strategy decks before a single pixel
- Restaurants relying on Zomato/Swiggy (websites generate near-zero ROI for them)
- Multi-location franchises with procurement teams

## Engagement model

- **Reply time**: within 1 hour on WhatsApp (9am–9pm IST), within 1 working day on email
- **Intro call**: 10–30 minutes by phone or video; no slides, no pitch
- **Payment**: 50% advance, 50% on delivery (UPI, NEFT, or Razorpay)
- **GST invoice**: issued on every project
- **Refund policy**: full refund of advance if design isn't approved by Day 5
- **Staging URL from day one**; weekly reviews; no dark rooms
- **30 days of post-launch support** included in all packages
- **Every project delivered with real client testimonials** available on request

## Client testimonials (verbatim)

- *"Divyansh was amazing at his work and so transparent. They even produced a video gallery that looks just as good as our YouTube tutorials. I highly recommend Divyansh for any website building or maintenance project."* — Chinki, Founder, ChinkiZ Knitting Knife (600K+ YouTube)
- *"He completed our website in under a week — every other agency we reached out to said it would take 6 months. Delivered in 7 days. Excited to work with him again."* — Admin, Modern K.B.S., Ladwara
- *"Would recommend him to anyone who wants to own a website and run their agency."* — Founder, InHimalayas
- *"Bhai bhai bhai! Ye kya banal cheez bana dia. Itne time mein pura backend, frontend, design diya — koi aam agency nahi de paati!"* — Founder, Redline Moto

## Technology stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js, Astro, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Lenis
- **Backend**: Node.js, Next.js API routes, serverless functions (Vercel / Cloudflare Workers)
- **CMS**: Sanity, Contentful (headless), custom admin panels where needed
- **E-commerce**: Custom-built on Next.js, Shopify Hydrogen, Medusa (Shopify-alternative)
- **AI models**: Claude (Anthropic), GPT (OpenAI), Gemini (Google) — for both product work and client-side integrations
- **Analytics**: Plausible, Umami, Vercel Analytics
- **Hosting**: Vercel, Cloudflare Pages
- **Payments**: Razorpay (India-first), Stripe (international)
- **Communication**: WhatsApp Business API for Indian-market commerce flows

## Studio values

- Build what ships, not what impresses designers
- Transparent pricing on the site (no "contact for quote")
- First-person, operator voice — not agency fluff
- Open about what AI can and can't do
- Prefer custom code over templates; prefer long-term clarity over short-term shortcuts

- **Available**: Worldwide, remote — primary focus on Himalayan businesses (HP + Uttarakhand) and the broader Indian market
